author: MKng-Z
title: Generic code analysis — bare excepts, TODOs, monolithic files, hardcoded URLs
notes: All four claims are factually inaccurate or misleading. (1) Bare excepts: claims 11, actual 6, and ALL are in test files, zero in production code. (2) TODO/FIXME: claims 53, actual ~29 in production code, but many are in detector definitions for a tool that detects code smells — expected and benign. (3) Monolithic files >50KB: all 6 qualifying files are test files, zero production files — 'Multiple core files' is false. (4) Hardcoded development URLs: no development URLs found; only legitimate CDN and GitHub raw content URLs exist. Submission provides no specific file paths or line numbers for any claim. Reads like a generic AI-generated template.
